Dependencies for building Flask documentation with Sphinx and related extensions.

# Purpose
The file lists dependencies for a Sphinx documentation project. It specifies the required Python packages: `pallets-sphinx-themes`, `sphinx`, `sphinx-issues`, `sphinxcontrib-log-cabinet`, and `sphinx-tabs`. These packages are necessary to build and enhance the documentation with themes, issue tracking, logging, and tabbed content features.
